sutta: once when the exhausted 1 was dwelling near savathi at jaita grove in anatapindi kaspar the venable kema and the verbal sumana dwelt in undergrowth near and they went and visited the exalted 1 saluted him and sat down at 1 side so seated the vulnerable kima said to him lord whatsoever among is arahan has destroyed the asavas lived the life done what ought to be done set down the burden found the highest goal destroyed becoming spawns and is in high knowledge released to him there comes no thought there is 1 better than i nor there is 1 equal nor there is 1 verse thus spoke the variable camera and the master approved and seeing that the verbal chemo got absolutely the exalted 1 and took his departure passing him by on the right now not long after he had gone the vulnerable sumana said this to the exalted 1 lord whatsoever among is arahant has destroyed the arsavast lived the life than what ought to be done set down the burden found the highest gain destroyed becoming spawns and is in high knowledge released to him there comes no thought there is none better than i nor there is none equal nor there is none worse thus spoke the venable sumana and the master approved and seen that the vulnerable sumana got up saluted and took his departure passing by on the right and shortly after they had gone the exalted 1 addressed the monk saying thus monks do clansmen declare knowledge the goal is told but self is not mentioned yet there are some foolish fellows here who declare knowledge braggingly it seems afterwards they suffer remorse that's the end of the sutta
commentary: this suitcase shows how the monks and nuns during the buddha's time when they attain arahan hood how they came and declared to the teacher the buddha that they had attained but in an indirect way they did not say that i attain hood and nowadays we see some people who learn some meditation and after a while they're very eager to let others know that they have become arya and this shows that they have not attained aryah especially if they get angry when others don't believe that they have attained um [Music] and this ego is just um makes it obvious that that person is not attained now we come to the next utah
